chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.565 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of M.A. No.9275/2025 For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------- 04.02.2026 Mr. Fayyaz Ahmed, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------------- Learned counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application and intends to file direct complaint in accordance with law, before the competent Court having jurisdiction. Order accordingly. Instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gusher/PS
